summary: Enrollment in informal (home-based) child care vouchers has more than tripled since Fiscal 2022, the fastest growth of any voucher category tracked by ACS. As with center-based and family child care vouchers, ACS attributes the increase to its 2023 launch of the MyCity online benefits application and to outreach efforts that greatly expanded the number of families using non-mandated, low-income vouchers.

sources.label: ACS, Fiscal 2026 Preliminary Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: increasing since the MyCity portal launched and outreach expanded
